svg.title: AI Blog full system architecture
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the full stack: browser client, AWS EC2 with Docker containers running Nginx, Gunicorn, Django with React static files, PostgreSQL database, and external Groq API.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the browser load from the AI blog app?')
sendPrompt('What does Nginx do in this app?')
sendPrompt('What does Gunicorn do and why is --no-sendfile needed?')
sendPrompt('How does React get served by Django as static files?')
sendPrompt('What REST APIs does Django expose for the blog?')
sendPrompt('What tables are stored in the PostgreSQL database?')
sendPrompt('How is the Groq API used for AI features in the blog?')
